title: Add Quality Observability Tables to Semantic Model
description: Add gold_quality_history, gold_gap_registry, and gold_low_confidence_audit tables to OEMInsightBI_v2 semantic model so Power BI can query them for quality dashboards.

reasoning.why: Task 018 creates 3 quality tables in the lakehouse, but without semantic model definitions, Power BI cannot query these tables. This task bridges that gap.
businessValue: Enables Power BI dashboards to show quality trends
Allows building the quality monitoring dashboard
Completes the data-to-visualization pipeline for quality observability

acceptanceCriteria: 3-5 DAX measures for quality reporting created
Tables visible in Power BI after semantic model refresh
notes: Gap identified: Task 018 creates lakehouse tables but doesn't add them to semantic model
Pattern: Follow existing .tmdl files in OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel for structure
DAX measures to create: Quality Score Trend, Gaps Open Count, Gaps Resolved Count, Low Confidence Match Count, Coverage Trend
CLAUDE: Write TMDL table definitions, relationship config, DAX measures
ERIK: Sync semantic model to Fabric, refresh model, verify tables appear in Power BI

subtasks.title: Create gold_quality_history.tmdl
subtasks.details: Table with 7 columns and 5 DAX measures (Latest Coverage Rate, Latest Match Rate, Pipeline Runs Count, Threshold Breaches, Quality Metrics Count)

subtasks.title: Create gold_gap_registry.tmdl
subtasks.details: Table with 11 columns and 7 DAX measures (Open Gaps Count, Resolved Gaps Count, Total Gaps Count, Gap Resolution Rate, Avg Gap Age Days, Total Gap Occurrences, Estimated Gap Impact)

subtasks.title: Create gold_low_confidence_audit.tmdl
subtasks.details: Table with 8 columns and 5 DAX measures (Low Confidence Matches Count, Avg Match Confidence, Low Confidence Spend Impact, Low Confidence Frequency, Critical Low Confidence Count)

subtasks.title: Define relationships to date dimension
subtasks.details: Tables use timestamp columns directly (no FK to dim_date). Users can filter by timestamp in Power BI. No explicit relationships needed.

subtasks.title: Create quality DAX measures
subtasks.details: 17 total DAX measures created across 3 tables in Quality Observability display folder

subtasks.title: Erik: Sync semantic model and verify tables in Power BI
subtasks.details: Sync semantic model from Git, refresh in Fabric, verify 3 new tables appear

progress: Claude complete (5/6 subtasks), awaiting Erik verification
